creator: charlz_klug@mail.ru
text:
After update installed ports smtp-cli not working with tls. May be this is solution: http://cpanforum.com/threads/13712 . My installed software:

[Charlz_Klug@Meleena]/usr/home/Charlz_Klug>$

Fix: 

Now I use "--disable-tls" argument for smtp-cli. Example:
[Charlz_Klug@Meleena]/home/Charlz_Klug>$ smtp-cli --host=smtp.inbox.ru --user=blabla --pass=blabla2 --from="someaddr@inbox.ru" --to="anotheraddr@mail.ru" --subject="subj " --body-plain="test." --disable-tls
How-To-Repeat: [Charlz_Klug@Meleena]/home/Charlz_Klug>$ smtp-cli --host=smtp.inbox.ru --user=blabla --pass=blabla2 --from="someaddr@inbox.ru" --to="anotheraddr@mail.ru" --subject="subj " --body-plain="test."
invalid SSL_version specified at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.12.4/IO/Socket/SSL.pm line 308
[Charlz_Klug@Meleena]/home/Charlz_Klug>$
